race.comment: Star Northern Rivers sprinter MY MUM'S TOYBOY (1) returned from a six-month spell with a devastating win over 1010m at Port Macquarie last start despite a crushing 62kgs. Carries the same weight today and won't find this any harder. The winner of six from nine at Grafton and is a huge chance to make it seven. THE WOLF (5) looks hardest to beat after chasing home MY MUM'S TOYBOY at Port Macquarie three weeks ago. That followed an eight-week let-up so he strips fitter and gets a 4.5 kg weight swing. Should make it interesting. WHAT A RUSH (8) led but weakened to finish fourth in that Port Macquarie sprint. Draws a lot better today and should be in contention for a long way. TECTONIC PLATE (3) course and distance winner who last start finished sixth over 1000m at Sunshine Coast. Might be ready to show something third-up.
